image_alt: Golden morning mist rising over the Mara River at dawn near Exploreans Mara River Camp in the Maasai Mara, Kenya.
caption: Morning mist rising over The Mara river at dawn
meta: Experience the stillness of dawn at Exploreans Mara River Camp. Watch the morning mist rise over the Mara River in the heart of the untouched Maasai Mara wilderness.
